overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a character in a dark leather jacket walking through rainy nighttime urban streets. The character moves from a cobblestone park area through a brick tunnel and along wet city streets with parked cars, street lamps, and pedestrians carrying umbrellas.

green leafy bushes along the left wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wet cobblestone park path at night, with rain falling steadily. Trees and bushes line the sides while a brick underpass looms ahead, illuminated by an ornate street lamp.

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow brick tunnel with debris scattered on the cobblestone floor. A person with an umbrella stands near the exit as the character emerges from the covered passage onto a lit street.

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wet asphalt street lined with parked cars and historic buildings. Pedestrians with umbrellas walk along the sidewalks as the character crosses the road between vehicles.

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a well-lit urban intersection with modern glass buildings. Pedestrians with umbrellas and backpacks walk along the sidewalks as the character navigates the crosswalk area in the rain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy urban environment that transitions from a secluded park into a bustling, modern city center. It begins with the character walking along a wet cobblestone path lined with trees, moving steadily toward the mouth of a brick underpass illuminated by an ornate street lamp. As the character passes through the narrow, debris-strewn tunnel, the scene opens up onto a lit asphalt street where parked cars and pedestrians with umbrellas line the historic buildings. The camera then follows the character along a darker stretch of sidewalk beside a graffiti-covered stone wall before the surroundings shift toward a more contemporary architectural style. Finally, the path leads into a brightly lit urban intersection characterized by towering glass buildings and a crowd of pedestrians navigating the rain-slicked crosswalk.
